arts.ttl: Tottenham fans' BOOZE BAN: Spurs and PSG supporters hit with bizarre restriction in pubs ahead of UEFA Super Cup final
arts.sum: Tottenham and PSG fans have been left thirsty ahead of the UEFA Super Cup final after a wide-reaching booze ban in Udine. Fans and locals have been given the same severe treatment.

arts.ttl: 'Good chance' for Spurs to play PSG in Super Cup
arts.sum: Wednesday's Super Cup could be a "good chance" for Tottenham Hotspur to play Champions League winners Paris St-Germain, who returned to training only last week, says Spurs correspondent Jamie Brown.
